componentVariants.name: button.primary
componentVariants.definition: Primary conversion or completion action in the current context.

componentVariants.name: button.secondary
componentVariants.definition: Secondary action placed near, but lower in priority than, the primary action.

componentVariants.name: button.destructive
componentVariants.definition: Action that deletes, cancels, or permanently changes user data.

componentVariants.name: card.feature
componentVariants.definition: Card explaining one benefit, capability, or reason to believe.

componentVariants.name: card.service
componentVariants.definition: Card presenting a service overview and path to learn or book.

componentVariants.name: card.product
componentVariants.definition: Card showing a product preview and path to details or purchase.

componentVariants.name: card.testimonial
componentVariants.definition: Card carrying social proof, quote, or attribution.

componentVariants.name: footer.global
componentVariants.definition: Primary footer with recovery navigation, contact, and legal links.
